contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 210
- Description: Lukas introduced by @⁨Ken Nim - Bay Area ⁩ popped by just now at the cafe I am hanging out to chat… he arrived just after my handing off of the above process to Sophia 
  
  _Key discussions_
  
  - didn’t realize he built and ran a tequila brand from scratch for a while and expanded it across the entire USA. He walked me through the end to end distributor onboarding process. I think we already have all the parts was just missing the keywords and the communication protocol. Will extend Sophia to handle this process as well.
  
  - ⁠Apparently singularity is already here. We talked through the hardware to software tech stack for a full standalone… will probably spin one up running one of the Chinese open source models which is already outperforming the American frontier models… basically the ones I have been experimenting with.
  
  - walked through vending machine economics. Something we were considering when exploring how to scale up distribution of drinking chocolate across USA 
  
  https://www.nimopc.com/products/refurbished-nimo-17-3-fhd-n172-amd-r9-6950h-laptop-grade-a?variant=47003315077371
  
  https://huggingface.co/Qwen/Qwen3.5-35B-A3B
